top_findings.title: Working source code in workspace
top_findings.evidence: Source exists and tests pass (17 tests), but npm run build fails: Cannot find module '../lib/tsc.js'
top_findings.suggestion: The runtime is broken; TypeScript must be regenerated or node_modules fixed. Tests pass but build cannot produce dist/

top_findings.title: TypeScript build fails
top_findings.evidence: npm run build: Error Cannot find module '../lib/tsc.js' in node_modules/.bin/tsc
top_findings.suggestion: node_modules corruption; regenerate with npm install
